# Mataar Formation

**Summary**: An Ediacaran sedimentary formation characterized by siliciclastics.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-malik|Malik, 2024]] studied the Mataar Formation as part of the Jibalah Group.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2024-malik|Malik, 2024]] alluvial fan and distributary channels

## Diagenetic History

- [[2024-malik|Malik, 2024]] not stated in source

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Mataar Formation is mostly siliciclastics and has conglomeratic facies in the basin. ([[2024-malik|Malik, 2024, p. 29]])
